message: The other day, we had a surprise winter storm that rolled in faster than I could grab my coffee! I’d been meaning to check our emergency supplies but kept putting it off. Luckily, I remembered stashing a few extra blankets and snacks in the closet just in case. When the power went out, we huddled under those blankets, sipping hot cocoa and sharing stories by flashlight. It turned a chilly, gray day into a cozy family moment! It’s a small win, but it made such a difference. A little prep can go a long way! Have you had a small win in your own emergency prep lately?
